preamble: A diphthong shift where the fronting-rising back diphthong ue lowers and shifts to the falling back diphthong au.

examples.note: Development of back mid-fronting diphthongs into low back diphthongs.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
